name: Checklist coverage
when_to_use: 需要只读展示交付物、审计项、上线条件或本地工具准备度的覆盖状态时用它，特别适合在回答中说明“已完成 N/M”。若用户必须勾选并把变更回传，应使用表单清单；若只关心一个百分比而不需逐项原因，用进度条即可。
why_valuable: 普通文本清单很难同时表达总体覆盖率、分组和缺口原因；本模板从状态行计算 N/M 与进度条，统一完成、缺失和进行中的视觉语义，并明确保持 display-only，避免看似可点击却无法回传。

en.when_to_use: Use it to display read-only coverage status for deliverables, audit items, launch conditions, or local-tool readiness, especially to say "N/M complete" in an answer. If users must check items and send changes back, use a form checklist; if only one percentage matters and per-item reasons do not, use a progress bar.
en.why_valuable: A plain-text checklist struggles to show overall coverage, grouping, and reasons for gaps at once; this template calculates N/M and a progress bar from status rows, gives complete, missing, and in-progress states consistent visual meaning, and explicitly stays display-only so it does not appear clickable without being able to report changes.

data_in.note: data.items is an ordered set of status rows; state accepts 'checked', 'unchecked', or 'partial', and missing or invalid values display as unchecked. N/M counts only checked as complete, while partial displays separately as in progress. Adjacent group values with the same name merge into a group heading; the component does not render a checkbox, avoiding the suggestion that it is editable.

schema.title?: string -- checklist title; displays "Coverage checklist" when omitted
schema.description?: string -- scope or acceptance note below the title
schema.items: {label:string,detail?:string,group?:string,state:'checked'|'unchecked'|'partial'}[] -- read-only status rows; checked counts toward the completed total

spec.note: Grows automatically with the number of groups and status rows; no fixed scrolling area, vh, or percentage height. Recommended for 3-20 items at a time; AI should summarize and group larger sets first.

data_in.note: data.items 是有序状态行；state 接受 'checked'、'unchecked' 或 'partial'，缺失/非法值按 unchecked 显示。N/M 仅把 checked 计为完成，partial 单独显示为 in progress。相邻且同名的 group 合并为分组标题；组件不渲染 checkbox，避免暗示可编辑。

schema.title?: string —— 清单标题；省略时显示 “Coverage checklist”
schema.description?: string —— 标题下的范围或验收说明
schema.items: {label:string,detail?:string,group?:string,state:'checked'|'unchecked'|'partial'}[] —— 只读状态行；checked 计入已完成数量

spec.note: 随分组与状态行数量自动增高；无固定滚动区、vh 或百分比高度。建议单次展示 3–20 项，更多项目应先由 AI 摘要分组。

example._why: 一个发布准备清单包含完成、缺失和进行中状态，并按质量与运营分组，能验证 N/M 计算、进度条、状态 pill 和解释文字。

minimal.title: Release readiness
minimal.description: Production launch gate for the July workspace update

items.label: Performance budget
items.detail: Dashboard p95 is still 120 ms above target

items.label: Rollback runbook
items.detail: Validated in staging with the on-call team

items.label: Status page notice
items.detail: Customer-facing maintenance note is not scheduled

uplink: none: 纯展示组件；所有悬停、滚动、原生链接或其他局部交互都只发生在自有 shadow 内，不向 AI 或宿主回传数据。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
